Solana trading alerts with context

Fast alerts are only useful when users can inspect them. SlimeWire connects token scans, wallet signals, charts, Telegram updates, proof cards, and terminal handoff.

Open terminalTelegram alerts

What this workflow covers

Token alerts

Surface contract addresses, pair movement, and fresh activity.

Wallet signals

Connect wallet activity to token context and chart review.

Telegram updates

Send useful group or DM alerts without losing the next action.

Chart handoff

Open the selected token with context already attached.

Proof cards

Keep calls and outcomes reviewable after the alert.

Risk context

Make alerts readable without implying guaranteed trades.

FAQ

What are Solana trading alerts?

Solana trading alerts notify users about token movement, wallet activity, scans, fresh pairs, or other trading signals.

Should alerts include chart links?

Yes. Alerts are more useful when they include chart links, market context, and a clear path to deeper review.

Can alerts guarantee profitable trades?

No. Alerts are informational and should be paired with personal review and risk management.
